name: Kronborg & Frederiksborg: Private Chauffeur Tour of North Zealand from Copenhagen
tagline: A private Mercedes and a flexible itinerary — the Strandvejen coastal drive to Hamlet's Castle, Fredensborg Palace, and Frederiksborg on the lake, all at your own pace
overview:
**Price: $1,022 per private group of up to 6 people — not per person.** For a family or group of 4–6, this works out to $170–$256 per person, making it competitive with the standard shared-tour option for larger groups who want exclusive use of a private vehicle.

The difference between this and the standard North Zealand castles tour is the vehicle and the flexibility — not the castles. You get a private Mercedes, hotel pickup, a guide who adapts the pace and commentary to your group, and a stop at Fredensborg Palace that the standard shared coach doesn't include. The route takes the Strandvejen — the scenic coastal road along the Øresund shore — rather than the motorway, adding 20 minutes of one of Denmark's most pleasant drives before reaching Helsingør.

For a lower price in a shared small group, the [Kronborg & Frederiksborg Castle Day Trip from Copenhagen](/tours/denmark/copenhagen-kronborg-frederiksborg-castles) covers the same two headline castles at a fraction of the cost — the right choice for solo travellers or pairs who don't need private exclusivity. This Royal Crew tour is the right choice for families or groups of 4–6 who want to set their own pace and prefer not to share a vehicle.
highlights: Strandvejen coastal drive — the scenic Øresund shore road north of Copenhagen, past waterfront villas and beach towns, rather than the motorway approach
Kronborg Castle in Helsingør — Shakespeare's 'Elsinore,' the UNESCO-listed Renaissance fortress on the tip of the Danish peninsula commanding the narrowest point of the Øresund
Fredensborg Palace — the summer and autumn residence of the Danish royal family, a 1722 Baroque palace on Lake Esrum; photo stop (exterior only from the park)
Frederiksborg Palace in Hillerød — the most spectacular Danish Renaissance palace, on three islands in the lake at Hillerød, with 75 minutes of guided interior access
Private vehicle (maximum 6 guests) with live English-speaking guide throughout

itinerary.description: Hotel pickup in a private vehicle. The guide introduces the day's route along the Strandvejen — the coastal road that runs north from Copenhagen along the Øresund shore, past the beach town of Klampenborg and the Louisiana Museum of Modern Art, before reaching the North Zealand castle circuit.

Visit Kronborg Castle — the UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance fortress on the Helsingør headland above the Øresund strait, where the crossing to Sweden narrows to 4 kilometres. Built by King Frederick II in the 1580s, Kronborg became 'Elsinore' in Shakespeare's Hamlet through its association with Danish royal power and the crossing that determined trade between the Baltic and the North Sea. The guide covers the fortress's history, its role as a toll station that funded Danish royal expansion, and the Hamlet connection. Interior entry is optional (not included in the tour price).

Drive via Fredensborg Palace — the summer and autumn residence of the Danish royal family, a 1722 Italianate Baroque palace built by King Frederick IV on the shore of Lake Esrum. The palace is a working royal residence and is not open to the public for most of the year; the exterior and the formal approach through the palace park are accessible. This stop is a bonus not included on the standard shared-coach North Zealand tours.

Guided visit to Frederiksborg Palace — the most extravagant Danish Renaissance palace, built by King Christian IV between 1600 and 1620 on three interconnected islands in the Hillerød lake. The palace houses the Museum of National History, with portraits, historical paintings, and decorative arts documenting Danish royal history from the Middle Ages to the present. The Neptune Fountain in the formal garden is the centrepiece of the south approach. Interior entry is optional (not included in the tour price); the guide walks the interior if you choose to enter.

included: Private vehicle (max 6 guests) and English-speaking guide for 5 hours
Hotel pickup and drop-off in Copenhagen
Fredensborg Palace photo stop (bonus — not on standard tours)
excluded: Kronborg Castle interior entry (optional, own expense)
Frederiksborg Palace interior entry (optional, own expense)
meeting_point: Copenhagen hotel pickup — confirm your hotel address with Royal Crew at booking. The route departs north along the Strandvejen coastal road.
tips: The $1,022 price is per private group of up to 6 — for a family or group of 4–6 this is $170–256 per person, comparable to individual tickets on the standard shared tour
This tour has 3 reviews as of July 2026 — a very thin history; the 5.0★ average is credible but based on minimal data; book with appropriate expectations for a newer listing
Kronborg's interior includes the casemates (underground passages where the legendary Holger Danske sits in stone, waiting to wake if Denmark is threatened) — worth entering for the folklore alone
Fredensborg Palace opens to the public in July only (when the royal family moves to another residence) — if your tour falls in July, the interior is worth an unplanned stop

faqs.question: How is this different from the standard Copenhagen castles day trip?
faqs.answer: The [standard Kronborg & Frederiksborg Castle Day Trip](/tours/denmark/copenhagen-kronborg-frederiksborg-castles) covers the same two headline castles in a shared small group at a lower price — the right choice for solo travellers or pairs who don't need a private vehicle. This Royal Crew tour provides a private Mercedes for up to 6 guests, hotel pickup, flexible pacing, the scenic Strandvejen coastal drive rather than the motorway, and a bonus stop at Fredensborg Palace (the royal family's summer residence, not on standard tours). At $1,022 per group, it's most cost-effective for 4–6 people travelling together.

faqs.question: Is the price per person or per group?
faqs.answer: Per private group of up to 6 people. The $1,022 is the total for the vehicle and guide, regardless of whether you are 1 or 6 people. For a group of 6, this is approximately $170 per person.

faqs.question: Are the castle entry fees included?
faqs.answer: No — Kronborg and Frederiksborg interior entry fees are paid separately on the day. The tour price covers the private vehicle, guide, and 5-hour service. The guide will advise on current entry prices at each site.

hero_image.alt: Kronborg Castle in Helsingør viewed from the sea — the Renaissance fortress on the Øresund strait, Shakespeare's Elsinore

meta.title: Kronborg & Frederiksborg: Private Chauffeur Tour of North Zealand from Copenhagen
meta.description: Private Mercedes chauffeur tour of North Zealand — Strandvejen coastal drive, Kronborg Castle (Elsinore), Fredensborg Palace, and Frederiksborg Palace. $1,022 per group of up to 6 people. Live guide.
